content.title: Task CRUD API & Data Model

userStory.iWant: to create, read, update, and delete tasks via a fast API
userStory.soThat: I can manage my work items programmatically and through the UI

acceptanceCriteria.when: I send a POST to /api/tasks with valid fields
acceptanceCriteria.then: a new task is created and returned with a unique ID

acceptanceCriteria.when: I send a PATCH with updated fields
acceptanceCriteria.then: the task is updated and a change event is published
the task is soft-deleted and removed from active views

acceptanceCriteria.when: I query with filters (assignee, label, status)
acceptanceCriteria.then: only matching tasks are returned, sorted by priority

content.technicalNotes: Schema must support future partitioning by workspace_id for multi-tenant scaling.
implementationDetails: Prisma schema with Task model supporting workspace_id partitioning
Fastify routes with Zod request/response validation
Domain event publisher using Node EventEmitter bridged to Redis pub/sub
Soft-delete via deletedAt timestamp column with query-level filtering
content.notes: This is the foundational story — all other work depends on the API being stable and well-documented.
